isolation.method: worktree torch/_inductor edited; built .so/_C/lib/bin/version.py symlinked from shared tree; PYTHONPATH-shadowed

measured_compile_us.delta_us: ~0 (no regression, no improvement on the target)
measured_compile_us.note: On THE TARGET the patch is perf-inert: the fold builds the chain but index-unification BAILS (Longformer write sources are constant_pad_nd conditional loads, not pure single-buffer loads), so the lowering keeps its original nested-where codegen -> identical compile time. By design the fold only changes codegen when it strictly collapses the source loads.

band_materialization.note: 100MB band NOT eliminated on the target (fold inert there). The proven gather target (296us, prior _gather_compile.py) remains the ceiling.

core_mechanism_proven.what: Lever A's load-bearing piece: collapse a chain of slice_scatter/select_scatter over a constant full() into ONE masked affine indirect load (a gather), via per-write source-index unification + where-selected index, with last-writer-wins.

evidence_direct_chain_synthetic.result: DECISIVE: a 16-deep disjoint scatter-chain-over-full collapses from 16 source loads to ~1 shared load (gather). Inductor's existing codegen compiles it to 1 fused kernel.

evidence_correctness.fp32_OVERLAPPING_last_writer: max_diff=0.0, torch.equal=True (last-writer-wins resolved correctly via where-fold first->last)

ima_bug_found_and_fixed.symptom: fold ON on demucs (sum_1e8a518eb72e, single slice_scatter over full) -> CUDA illegal memory access (cudaErrorIllegalAddress).
ima_bug_found_and_fixed.cause: unified indirect load ops.load(buf, sel_idx) is evaluated UNCONDITIONALLY (then where-masked); at UNCOVERED output positions sel_idx is out of bounds -> IMA. This is exactly the constant_pad_nd clamp trap from the design doc, surfacing in the indirect-load form.
ima_bug_found_and_fixed.fix: clamp sel_idx into [0, numel-1] before indirect_indexing (mirrors the proven gather-rewrite's index .clamp()); the final where still discards the clamped value at uncovered positions. After fix: demucs check PASS, no IMA, codegen identical to baseline (2 kernels, 4 loads).

why_inert_on_target_root_cause_pinned.mechanism: The chain self-breaks at realization BEFORE the band assembles. Interleaved fold/realize trace (realize_interleave_trace.py): FOLD nwrites=1 -> FOLD nwrites=2 -> REALIZE shape=(96,4,256,513) in_chain_table=True. The 2-write chain's inner_fn opcount is ~40 (each write src is a ~18-op pad+permute+view chain), which trips has_large_inner_fn (>30) and realizes; subsequent scatters then read the realized ComputedBuffer, not the chain, so folding cannot continue.
why_inert_on_target_root_cause_pinned.why_unification_does_not_save_it: Index-unification (the only thing that drops opcount enough to stay lazy) BAILS on Longformer because each write's source is NOT a pure single-buffer load: probe_src_pad_pattern.py shows the source op sequence is [ge,lt, masked{load:arg1_1}, ge,lt, masked{constant}, where] = the constant_pad_nd boundary (pad the bmm by 1 row). It is where(pad_bounds, masked_load(arg1_1), pad_const), a CONDITIONAL load, which the pure-load probe (correctly) rejects.
why_inert_on_target_root_cause_pinned.fully_lazy_is_not_the_fix: Re-confirmed in this tree (threshold_sweep): all-thresholds=inf removes all 6 band buffers but is ~4x SLOWER (8468us vs 2078us wall) because the fully-lazy nested-where tower recomputes O(depth) selection with 273 loads / 5057 ops per element and no flat index. The win REQUIRES the unified single-load form, not just laziness.

remaining_hard_part_precise: Extend index-unification to recognize a constant_pad_nd-style CONDITIONAL source: where(pad_bounds, masked_load(buf, idx), pad_const). Must (a) structurally extract (buf, idx_expr, pad_bounds_predicate, pad_const) from the where/masked/ge/lt op tree (a symbolic-value probe that tracks which produced value is the load result through the where, not just flag ops); (b) in the unified emit, fold pad_bounds into the per-write coverage mask and substitute pad_const where the pad is out of bounds (distinct from the band base fill); (c) keep the clamp so the unconditional load never IMAs. This is per-write src structure recognition + correct multi-fill recomposition. Also still needed: thread the chain through ReinterpretView/PermuteView/View readbacks (SliceView/squeeze already threaded) so the FULL band assembles as one chain before the realize decision; today the chain reaches only ~2 writes before realization breaks it (which the opcount drop from unification would itself prevent).

regression_spot_check.all_fold_on: bit-exact (--check True) on: amax_sum_528a3c274a41 (target, Longformer infer), pointwise_76e48e105773 (timm mobilevit, non-Longformer, 3 scatters), sum_1e8a518eb72e (torchbench demucs, non-Longformer, single scatter), amax_sum_7303c49b6018 (Longformer train, 55 scatters), amax_sum_bf7830302e6d (Longformer train).

compile_us_fold_off_vs_on.sum_1e8a518eb72e_demucs: ~35 -> ~43 (within the 28-43 run-to-run variance seen in BOTH configs; codegen identical: 2 kernels/4 loads fold on==off)

regression_spot_check.verdict: No correctness regression anywhere; no structural perf regression (fold is no-op-equivalent codegen when unification bails, which is every non-pure-load chain incl. all Longformer points).

remaining_effort_estimate: 1-2 weeks for a correct, safely-bailing version. The load-bearing index-unification core is BUILT and proven bit-exact (incl. overlap + IMA clamp). What remains: (1) the constant_pad_nd conditional-source extractor + multi-fill recompose (~1 wk, correctness-sensitive: the -3.39e38 key-bias vs -inf invalid-key fill vs pad-0 fill must stay distinct) and (2) ReinterpretView/PermuteView/View readback threading (~2-4 days; SliceView/squeeze done). Once the source-extractor handles the pad, the opcount drops below 30, the chain stops self-realizing, threading lets it complete, and the existing-codegen gather (proven 296us) should fall out. This is materially less than the multi-week FX-pattern-match path (no diagonal_skew_elimination ordering fight, no all-consumers-rewritability proof) AND now de-risked by a working core.
